case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. NICOLA ALLEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, NICOLA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, NICOLA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, NICOLA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 888 O'FARRELL STREET, W1005 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANT, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANT IF ANY** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69731810) (TRANSACTION ID # 69731810)
